title: iris spuria subsp. gueldenstaedtiana
intro: Iris spuria subsp. gueldenstaedtiana, also known as the Gueldenstaedt's iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Iris spuria subsp. gueldenstaedtiana include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and support immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use requires caution and should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
